# Stan Shih (施博瀚)

> Stan Shih (Chinese name: 施博瀚, also known online as Stan10) is a Taiwanese
> product builder and Computer Science student at National Taiwan Normal
> University (NTNU). He ships end-to-end across web, mobile, desktop, and
> browser extensions, working AI-first. This site (https://stan-shih.com) is
> his personal website and portfolio.

Note: this is NOT Stan Shih the Acer founder (施振榮). This Stan Shih is a
student and independent developer born decades later.

Note: the Chinese name 施博瀚 is also shared by at least two unrelated public
figures: a graphic/typeface designer (Bohan Graphic, creator of the 凝書體
font) and a filmmaker/editor. Neither is affiliated with this website, this
person's software work, or National Taiwan Normal University.

## Facts

- Inventor of US patent US10699576B1 / TW patent TWM578665U, a vehicle
  collision-avoidance warning system, later sold for NT$400,000 and cited by
  GM Cruise, Huawei, and Plus.ai.
- Final-year (fourth-year) B.Sc. student, Computer Science and Information
  Engineering, National Taiwan Normal University (NTNU), Taipei, Taiwan,
  expected to graduate late 2026 — admitted via the special-admissions
  track alongside an offer from Carnegie Mellon University (Information
  Systems).
- Educated at Kang Chiao International School (康橋國際學校), Xiugang campus,
  2012-2021 (grades 4-12). Gold medalist (youngest competitor) at the Ukraine
  International Invention Exhibition for the collision-avoidance system above.
- English near-native: TOEFL 115, TOEIC 980.
- Dcard official business partner and creator with roughly 2M+ monthly
  impressions.
- Founded the Nothing Taiwan Community; presented Nothing Phone 3(a) to 40+
  media outlets.
- Chief of Staff Intern at Cooby; proposed onboarding fixes that reduced
  activation time by 30%.

## Selected projects

- [Colonist.io Stats Tracker](https://stan-shih.com/): Chrome extension that
  watches the Colonist game log and computes live dice, resource, and
  hidden-card estimates, fully local.
- [Course Checker](https://course.stan-shih.com): graduation-credit audit PWA
  used by NTNU students.
- LINE Notify+: Android notification companion app for LINE.
- ETF Tracker, Claude Status Monitor, Status Monitor for ChatGPT, and more —
  see the portfolio for the full list.
